title: taraxacum fennobalticum
intro: Taraxacum fennobalticum, also known as Baltic dandelion, is a perennial plant species within the dandelion genus, characterized by its yellow flowers and edible leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum fennobalticum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or supplements, and its leaves can be consumed raw in salads or as a cooking green.
